description_long: This vending machine features a rectangular, boxy structure with a large transparent front panel that reveals several rows of cylindrical products inside. The exterior is primarily dark gray with bold red and light gray accent bands, giving it a modern, urban appearance. On the right side of the front face, there is a control panel with a prominent red knob, a rectangular button, and a payment interface, all set against a contrasting background. The lower section of the machine includes a wide, horizontal slot likely intended for product retrieval. The sides and back are solid, with no visible openings or interactive elements, emphasizing a secure and tamper-resistant design. The overall build suggests a sturdy, metal construction suitable for outdoor or high-traffic public spaces.
description: A modern, boxy vending machine with a large transparent front, red and gray accents, and a visible control and payment panel on the right side.
description_view_0: The front view shows the transparent product window, control panel with buttons and knob, and a wide retrieval slot at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid, featureless surface with color banding, lacking any interactive elements.
description_view_2: The rear view is entirely solid and unadorned, with only the color bands visible and no access points or controls.
description_view_3: The right side view is also featureless, showing only the color bands and the machine's rectangular profile.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular, light blue-tinted display panel is located on the upper right of the front face, occupying a small area above the control and payment interface. The panel appears to be opaque or frosted, with no visible digital content or text.
attribute_payment_interface: A small, rectangular payment interface is present below the red knob on the right side of the front face, featuring a slot and a button, likely for coins or cards.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: There is a single prominent red knob and a rectangular button on the right side of the front face, suggesting a simple selection mechanism rather than a full keypad.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal slot is located at the bottom of the front face, likely serving as the product retrieval area.
